ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source dataset */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism from which the data was collected */,
  "organism_part" TEXT /* Part of the organism from which the data was collected */,
  "developmental_stage" TEXT /* Developmental stage of the organism */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the organism */,
  "disease" TEXT /* Disease state of the organism */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Type of cell from which the data was collected */,
  "ancestry_category" TEXT /* Ancestry category of the organism */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age of the organism */,
  "assay_name" TEXT /* Name of the assay used to collect the data */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the dataset belongs to */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "data_status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., active, archived, deleted) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the sample belongs to */,
  "fractionation_method" TEXT /* Method used to fractionate the sample */,
  "fraction_identifier" INTEGER /* Identifier for the fraction */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label assigned to the sample */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material in the sample */,
  "sample_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "sample_status" TEXT /* Status of the sample (e.g., active, used, discarded) */,
  "sample_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the instrument was used for */,
  "ms2_mass_analyzer" TEXT /* Type of mass analyzer used */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "modification_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for modification */,
  "dissociation_method" TEXT /* Method used for dissociation */,
  "collision_energy" REAL /* Energy used for collision */,
  "precursor_mass_tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance for precursor mass */,
  "fragment_mass_tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance for fragment mass */,
  "instrument_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the instrument */,
  "instrument_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "instrument_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_uri" TEXT /* URI of the file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "file_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was created */,
  "file_last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was last modified */,
  "file_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "user_last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "user_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
